item_text: user -> admin — type=message; label="adduser()"; explanation="user sends adduser() to admin"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-usertoserverassociation-002 title: user sends query to database module: user to database communication source pages: 2,3,4 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - query: select * from users test steps: 1. user logs in. 2. user sends the query "select * from users" to the database. 3. database processes the query. 4. database returns the results to the user. expected result: user receives the results of the query from the database.

item_text: admin -> user — type=message; label="removeuser()"; explanation="admin sends removeuser() to user"
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-removeuser-001 title: admin removes a user module: user management source pages: 1,3 preconditions: admin has a valid username and password. test data: - user to remove: testuser test steps: 1. admin logs in. 2. admin navigates to the "remove user" section. 3. admin selects "testuser" from the list of users. 4. admin clicks the "remove user" button. expected result: admin receives a confirmation message that the user has been removed successfully.
